creator: novel@FreeBSD.org
text:
Committed, thanks!

I've made some minor changes along the way:

 * Added USE_LDCONFIG= because we install shared libs
 * Set pkg-config dir to "${PREFIX}/libdata/pkgconfig" as that's the one that's used on FreeBSD
 * Added '--disable-werror' since it's usually not good to enable that for non-development builds due to a lot of possible compiler/version combination that might trigger error
 * Added TEST_TARGET= test so it was possible to run the tests using 'make test'.
